notes: Official Refuel site confirms cafe menu and delivery channels. Item names, descriptions and prices were cross-checked against Foodpanda Refuel Cafe Singapore pages because the official site links out to delivery menus.

items.name: Fuel Me Up
items.description: Baked eggs with pork meatballs, peppers, tomato sauce, mushroom, bacon and cheese.

items.name: Salmon Benedict
items.description: Toast with smoked salmon, poached eggs, avocado, miso hollandaise and greens.

items.name: Full Tank
items.description: Scrambled eggs, smoked salmon, chicken sausage, bacon, mushroom, beans, tomato and toast.

items.name: Miso Baked Salmon
items.description: Miso-marinated salmon with mashed potato, broccolini, tomatoes and mushroom.

items.name: Honey Baked Chicken
items.description: Whole chicken leg with mashed potato, cauliflower, mushroom cream sauce and truffle oil.

items.name: Miso Carbonara
items.description: Carbonara with bacon, miso, poached egg, cheese and creamy egg sauce.

items.name: Creamy Shrimps
items.description: Thai-inspired spicy cream pasta with shrimp, onions, chilies and cheese.

items.name: Mentaiko Mac & Cheese
items.description: Penne baked with salmon, broccoli, cheeses, mentaiko sauce, bonito flakes and tobiko.

items.name: Latte
items.description: Espresso with steamed and foamed milk.

items.name: Biscoff Milkshake
items.description: Vanilla ice cream blended with Biscoff cookies and whipped cream.

notes: Official Vivo City menu page is image-based. Representative VivoCity-exclusive dishes and prices were cross-checked against recent public menu coverage from MiddleClass.sg, The Ordinary Patrons, Our Parenting World, Alvinology and Chope.

items.name: Triple Truffle Fries
items.description: Truffle fries from the VivoCity menu.

items.name: Totcho Supreme
items.description: Tater tots with smashed avocado, sour cream, nacho cheese and crispy bacon.

items.name: Salmon & Fennel Salad
items.description: Salmon and fennel salad.

items.name: The VIVO Breakfast
items.description: Smoked sausage, roasted cheesy tomato, eggs, avocado mash, mushroom and focaccia.

items.name: Flatbread Hammy Benny
items.description: Handmade flatbread with shaved ham, eggs, mushroom ragout and hollandaise.

items.name: Budae Jigae Shashuka
items.description: Lightly spiced kimchi tofu stew with chorizo, eggs, cheese and focaccia.

items.name: Roasted Garlic Miso Butter
items.description: Casarecce with miso butter, Italian herbs, pork sausage and roasted garlic.

items.name: Hokkien Mee
items.description: Spaghetti with prawn bisque, crispy lard, shrimp sambal and grilled prawn.

items.name: Hot Honey Pepperoni
items.description: Pepperoni pizza with ricotta and hot honey.

items.name: Mentaiko Cream
items.description: White pizza with squid, mentaiko cream and nori.

notes: Official cafe page confirms the cafe serves coffee and Japanese pastries. Item names, descriptions and prices were cross-checked against Foodpanda Suzuki Gourmet Coffee (Chin Bee) and official Suzuki product pages for roast details.

items.name: Iced Chowa White
items.description: Iced milk coffee using Chowa medium-balance blend with chocolate and caramel notes.

items.name: Hot Chowa White
items.description: Hot milk coffee using Chowa medium-balance blend.

items.name: Iced Yugen White
items.description: Iced milk coffee using Yugen dark robust blend with cacao and hickory notes.

items.name: Indonesia Komasti White (Single Origin) Hot
items.description: Hot white coffee with Indonesia Komasti natural-sundried beans.

items.name: Brazil Fazenda Santa Monica White (Single Origin) Iced
items.description: Iced white coffee with Brazil Fazenda Santa Monica beans.

items.name: Hot Dark Chocolate
items.description: Hot chocolate drink.

items.name: Lemon Madeleines
items.description: One lemon madeleine with a light buttery sponge texture.

items.name: Chocolate Brownie
items.description: Dense dark chocolate brownie.

items.name: Red Bean Dorayaki
items.description: Japanese pancake confection with red bean paste.

items.name: Naruto Kintoki Sweet Potato Rustic
items.description: Rustic pastry made with Naruto Kintoki sweet potatoes.

notes: Official Glasshouse menu page lists current Neil Road menu images; official ongoing-specials page was also used for seasonal and weekend specials. Prices are subject to GST and service charge according to the menu.

items.name: Flatbread with Elderflower Balsamic
items.description: House-made flatbread with elderflower balsamic and French butter.

items.name: Hummus Bowl
items.description: Hummus with flatbread, dukkah, pomegranate and extra virgin olive oil.

items.name: Kale & Arugula Salad
items.description: Salad with sweet potatoes, parsnip, apple, walnuts, almonds, feta and lemon vinaigrette.

items.name: Truffle Fries
items.description: Fries with pecorino cheese, white truffle oil, dehydrated truffle and chives.

items.name: Avocado Dukkah Tartine
items.description: Marinated tomatoes, smashed avocado and dukkah on sourdough.

items.name: Eggs Benny Bagel
items.description: Sous vide eggs, hollandaise, wilted greens and prosciutto on a bagel.

items.name: Angus Beef Burger
items.description: Black Angus beef patty with smoked cheddar, pickles, onion marmalade and fries.

items.name: The Carbonara
items.description: Spaghetti with guanciale, egg yolk, black pepper and pecorino.

items.name: Truffle Mushroom Pasta
items.description: Spaghetti with wild mushroom, truffle cream sauce, pecorino and shaved black truffle.

items.name: Ricotta Pancake
items.description: Ricotta pancake with mascarpone cream, mixed berries and granola.

items.name: Glasshouse Brunch Plate
items.description: Scrambled eggs, tomatoes, mushrooms, kurobuta sausage, avocado, salad and sourdough.

items.name: King Prawn Laksa Goreng
items.description: Stir-fried noodles with laksa paste, king prawn, squid, crab meat, tau pok and fish cake.
